memory-consolidation.note: Not trim-first eligible — requires refactoring, not deletion. Two active pattern stores: neural-tools.ts (766 lines, 6 MCP tools, models.json) and intelligence.ts (1608 lines, 30 importers, patterns.json). Already partially coordinated (intelligence reads from models.json at init). Shared embedding pipeline prevents vector incompatibility. @monomind/memory HNSW (8943 lines, 3 importers) exists but is barely used. Consolidation requires rewriting neural MCP tool handlers to delegate to intelligence.ts — substantial refactoring beyond audit scope.

hooks-architecture-unify.note: Deleted 8 orphaned subsystems (~5,792 lines): planning, subgraph, optimization, confidence, messaging, nested-swarm, daemons, reasoningbank. Zero external importers confirmed. Kept: registry, executor, mcp, observability/interrupt, synthesis, workers. Fixed 3 internal refs (swarm/index.ts, cli/guidance-cli.ts, mcp/index.ts). Deleted 6 orphaned test files. All 38 hook tests pass (608 tests).

agent-definitions-trim.note: Trimmed from 127 to 43 agent .md files (36 in run 1, 7 macOS forks regrew). All 13 router TASK_AGENTS slugs covered. No further trimming needed — remaining agents serve live routing paths.

guidance-right-size.note: Trimmed from 8,383 to 851 lines (90% reduction). Kept: gates.ts (392), types.ts (435), index.ts (24). Build clean.

hive-mind-right-size.note: Deleted 5 CLI command files (1,135 lines). MCP tools version retained. Build clean.

security-monofence-merge.note: Inlined @monomind/security (272 lines, 2 functions) into packages/@monomind/cli/src/utils/input-guards.ts. Updated 2 consumers (mcp-server.ts, memory-tools.ts). Deleted entire packages/@monomind/security/ directory. Removed from CLI optionalDependencies, tsconfig references, packages workspace. All 45 security tests pass. monofence-ai kept as-is (distinct DDD responsibility, 2,217 lines).

prompt-engineering-audit.note: Run 2: deleted 21 dead skill dirs (~6MB). Run 3: deleted 17 dead command dirs (122 files, ~13MB). .claude/ reduced from 91MB to 56MB. Remaining: mastermind commands (61 files, 8MB), sparc (32 files, 4.2MB) — both actively invoked. 5 live skill dirs remain. Updated CLAUDE.md to reflect inlined security package.

routing-confidence-verify.note: Verified with 6 diverse prompts: scores range 0.86-0.939, all distinct. Formula works correctly.

prior_phases.phase1: 22 areas converged — deleted 27k lines of stubs, commit 31961cd5
prior_phases.phase2: 14 areas converged — wired D-grade layers to consumers, commit 6b890570
prior_phases.phase3_trigger: Unbiased external feedback identified: 3 great things (monograph, init, audit itself), OK middle (memory, hooks, monobrowse, routing), honest problems (prompt bloat, hive-mind fiction, guidance over-engineering, security masquerading)
